seo.description: About the demo bundle — a multi-page showcase for Portfolio Website Builder.

paragraphs: This site demonstrates every v1 widget type across six pages. It is a reference bundle for authors learning the content format.

items.title: Layout containers
items.text: Row, column, and grid widgets with nested children on the Layouts page.

items.title: Portfolio cards
items.text: Project grid with tags, meta, images, and internal page links.

items.title: Rich app cards
items.text: Apps showcase with carousels, stats, and store download badges.

items.title: Media widgets
items.text: Photo walls, lightbox grids, and swipeable carousels on the Gallery page.
